programmes.show_description: In the Pilbara region, the Ferals hit a run of nuggets that could transform their season. Meanwhile, the Gold Retrievers are rocked by a medical emergency. S7, Ep19
Garden of Evil. A vet and a military mum tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's Cayo Venado. Will a week of freezing rain lead the survivalists right up to breaking point? S2, Ep5
Lord of the Rats. A workaholic and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, will they be able to come together as a team? S2, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Grace Family Church. The team travel to Virginia to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. But they run into challenges when equipment is delayed. S6, Ep8
Marion Bowling Alley. The team travel to Virginia to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. But, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated. S6, Ep9
Enter A Titan. Shawn needs a strong start to build his mega-dredge but newcomer Ken and the 600-ton Myrtle Irene may have beat him to it. Emily's plan to dive deep is in jeopardy. S7, Ep1
Crash Course. To fund the mega-dredge, Shawn races to the Bluff where Kris is onto some of the best gold. Emily's most promising summer might suddenly be dashed on the rocks. S7, Ep2
A new crew are under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers receive some welcome help. S5, Ep6
The Galapagos Giant. On one of his most audacious and exciting expeditions to date, Forrest travels to the remote Galapagos Islands in search of the fabled Fernandina tortoise. S2, Ep5
Nowhere to Go But Down. Tempers flare on the Northwestern and the future looks uncertain for the Seabrooke as the fleet prepares to begin their winter hunt for Opilio crab. S8, Ep9
Rise and Fall. As unrelenting winds rip across the crab grounds, the Wizard prepares to do battle with the descending polar ice pack. Meanwhile, tempers flare on board the Kodiak. S8, Ep10
Devil's Handshake. It's the final push before winter hits and season goals slip away. Pump problems for Boyce put his gold haul at risk, and Ben banks on his skills to survive. S1, Ep6
Gold Rush Of The Atlantic. Josh has a fresh lead on a shipwreck from 1715 with a potentially massive treasure haul. He launches an expedition into Florida's Atlantic coast. S6, Ep4
Hunt For The Chupacabra. Josh Gates embarks on yet another mission, this time into the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico in search of the mysterious Chupacabra. S6, Ep5
Home Is Where The Yurt Is. In the Tennessee mountains, the Raneys construct a massive yurt. They turn a rundown pond into a food source and create a workshop with a propane forge. S4, Ep8
Cloudy With A Chance Of Explosives. Slim Pickings' efforts to recycle precious dam water are derailed. The Blacklighters scrounge for any last opal in their Land of Promise Claim. S7, Ep4
Dig And Digger. Sam smashes opal with a jackhammer in the Bushmen's mine. Plus, Rod and Les make a wager that will force the loser to wear one of Sam's pink shirts. S7, Ep5
Salt Wounds. Sig heads off the grid on a daring midnight mission, hoping to shake his rivals. Plus, Keith receives big news from his doctor regarding a mystery illness. S14, Ep4
Collision Void. Keith struggles to keep the Wizard afloat as a flooding collision void threatens to sink him. Plus, Jake is left stranded when a boat part goes missing. S14, Ep5
An officer is spat on as he tries to arrest an angry fugitive, and a rookie cop hits the jackpot in a raid of a suspected criminal's home. S5, Ep3
Nothing Personal. Rob tries to trace the source of a dangerous new batch of drugs that's been causing a spate of overdoses in Medway. Dan chases down an aggressive drunk driver. S1, Ep2
The Poseidon Crew's mine site is swamped after a brutal storm. Ryan collapses in a deadly heatwave, while Russell and Shane uncover a big nugget. S7, Ep20
Surthrive. An independent mother of three, plus a jungle savvy Green Beret, take on the remote wetlands of Guyana. But will they be up to the task? S2, Ep7
Easier Said Than Done. A nurturing mother, and an independent adventurer try to survive in the rainforests of Nicaragua. Can they conquer two weeks Naked and Afraid? S2, Ep8
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Texas Tavern Sign. The team visits a favourite local restaurant to salvage signage. Plus, they learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili. S6, Ep10
St. Agatha's Catholic Church. The crew travels to Ellwood City to reclaim pieces of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. In the bitter cold, they salvage stained glass and spiral ducting. S6, Ep11
Into The Red. Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to join forces with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into enemy waters and Wild Bill seeks work in Russia. S16, Ep7
Mayday Mayday. The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call, as captains and crew brace a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard. S16, Ep8
Cold War Heating Up. As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Meanwhile, Jake's new deckhand suffers an injury. S16, Ep9
The Lucky Day. Sweltering temperatures and a waterlogged mine threaten to unravel The Digi Diggers' season-long dream. The Cheals' starter motor fails on their wash plant. S6, Ep20
New Terra. The Bushmen put their lives on the line in the most dangerous mine they have ever worked. Plus, the Cheal's first dig of the season grinds to a halt. S7, Ep1
Between A Rod And A Hard Place. A rookie miner gets trapped down a mine shaft. A dust storm forces the Blacklights to reluctantly return to the failed Land of Promise money pit. S7, Ep2
Huge floods and a mini tornado hit the Gemfields. Max fights his way to his mining lease, but did the flooding fill or destroy his dam? Todd and Brianna get bad news. S1, Ep5
It's almost the end of the mining season. Water in the dam means one last chance for sapphires for Max and Glenn. It's terror in the tunnels for Todd and Brianna. S1, Ep6
New Opportunities. Old Timer, Ray, and his best mate Paul set foot on a new claim for the first time. The Apprentices begin connecting two mine shafts via an underground drive. S2, Ep1
After a frustrating day, the Ferals hit a gold hot streak. An injury rocks the Gold Timers, while Shane and Russell struggle with their homemade sluice. S6, Ep5
Prospectors Jacqui and Andrew uncover gold in Queensland. The Poseidon Crew get some exciting news, while the Dust Devils spend big on new equipment. S6, Ep6
The Gold Timers fight back against gold thieves. Machinery problems continue to plague the Dust Devils, while Marcus is panicked when Linden goes missing. S6, Ep7
Kate. Meet Extreme Cheapskate and dumpster diver Kate who takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City. S1, Ep1
Terence/Greg. When penny-pincher Terence is asked to attend a special family dinner, he puts everyone on a strict budget. Plus, Greg puts his cheap skills to the test on a first date. S1, Ep2
Victoria. Victoria refuses to shower at home and lives well under her means. When boyfriend Steve moves in, how will he handle her frugal ways and meals foraged from the wild? S1, Ep3
Abdul & Vickie. Abdul is the ultimate cheapskate, even haggling the price of an anniversary cake. Vicki refuses to buy a TV or clothes for her kids, and uses road kill for gifts. S1, Ep4
Volcano Portal In Mexico. A witch taunts investigators in a graveyard, a woman's late husband checks in on their baby, and an erupting volcano spews paranormal activity. S7, Ep12
The Trunk. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey visit a museum in Florida. Reports of multiple attacks on volunteers have sparked the need for a paranormal investigation. S4, Ep3
